name: cogno-sponsored-bind-relay
description: cogno-chain D1 bind-funding — a funded LIVENESS-only relay that pays the fee for the trustless on-chain identity bind (cognoGate.link_identity_signed). The runtime is the sole verifier; the relay cannot forge or retarget a binding. Closes the new-user funding gap without weakening the DoS defence.
comment: Dependencies (polkadot-api, @polkadot-labs/hdkd*, @polkadot-api/descriptors) are shared with the frontend via node_modules -> ../../app/node_modules (a gitignored symlink, recreated in CI). The unit test (relay.test.mjs) imports only ./lib.mjs + ../_shared (node-builtins only) and needs no install; the live submit is exercised by app/scripts/d1-bind-funding-acceptance.mjs. See README.md.
